title: International Flavors (IFF) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Decline Y/Y
text: International Flavors' (IFF) Q3 earnings fall year over year as lower volumes offset the impact of higher pricing and productivity gains.

title: International Flavors (IFF) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: International Flavors (IFF) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.89 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.76 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.36 per share a year ago.

title: Compared to Estimates, International Flavors (IFF) Q3 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics

title: IFF Announces Continuation of Cooperation Agreement with Icahn Capital
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $IFF--IFF (NYSE: IFF) today announced the continuation of the cooperation agreement with Icahn Capital LP and its affiliates. Icahn Capital and IFF have agreed to renominate one Icahn director and one mutually agreed director to the IFF board for the 2024 proxy season. “The Icahn Group's relationship with IFF has brought relevant market experience to and enhanced the financial expertise of the IFF Board. title: International Flavors & Fragrances: A Small Recovery Driven By A Nice Divestment
text: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. has been struggling since acquiring DuPont's business, leading to stagnant growth and rising costs. The company has divested assets to tackle leverage and address debt concerns. The recent divestment of the company's cosmetic ingredients business unit to Clariant has helped manage debt reduction and instill investor confidence.

title: IFF Declares Dividend for Fourth Quarter 2023
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $IFF--IFF (NYSE: IFF) announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.81 per share of its common stock, payable on January 8, 2024 to shareholders of record as of December 28, 2023.
